calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-28-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Michael Sullivan, Esq. for Plaintiff: D.C. Taylor Co.
Plaintiff's witness: James Meyrsieck, V.P., was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Agreement by the parties dtd. 9-5-03-----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Invoice dtd. 10-21-03--------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Invoice dtd. 12-17-03--------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Foreign Trade Service, Inc. as follows:
Damages $25,789.00
Prejudgment interest $1,261.10
Attorney's Fees $912.50
Costs $347.50 for a total of $28,310.10
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of the exhibits.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2004 Continued To Oct-08-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
